item.title: Version 1.10
item.description:
What's New in 1.10

  • # Version 1.10
  • Until now, every rewrite gave you the same four suggestions. v1.10 lets you decide.
  • ## Make your own recipes
  • Pick which suggestions you want — 1 to 4, any mix. Two structure options to compare? Two different tones? Just grammar and clarity? Set it up once, and it stays.
  • ## Switch on the fly
  • A new row of pills sits at the bottom of the panel. Tap a different recipe and Second Draft re-runs your text against it. No re-copying, no closing the panel.
  • ## Set your default
  • Star the recipe you use most. That one opens automatically when you bring up the panel.
  • ## Your old setup carries over
  • If you'd already customized your suggestions, they're now a recipe — same settings, new home. No setup needed on your end.
